2604.26417.title: EmoTransCap: Dataset and Pipeline for Emotion Transition-Aware Speech Captioning in Discourses
2604.26417.paper_summary: Emotion perception and adaptive expression are fundamental capabilities in human-agent interaction. While recent advances in speech emotion captioning (SEC) have improved fine-grained emotional modeling, existing systems remain limited to static, single-emotion characterization within isolated sentences, neglecting dynamic emotional transitions at the discourse level. To address this gap, we propose Emotion Transition-Aware Speech Captioning (EmoTransCap), a paradigm that integrates temporal emotion dynamics with discourse-level speech description. To construct a dataset rich in emotion transitions while enabling scalable expansion, we design an automated pipeline for dataset creation. This is the first large-scale dataset explicitly designed to capture discourse-level emotion transitions. To generate semantically rich descriptions, we incorporate acoustic attributes and temporal cues from discourse-level speech. Our Multi-Task Emotion Transition Recognition (MTETR) model performs joint emotion transition detection and diarization. Leveraging the semantic analysis capabilities of LLMs, we produce two annotation versions: descriptive and instruction-oriented. These data and annotations offer a valuable resource for advancing emotion perception and emotional expressiveness. The dataset enables speech captions that capture emotional transitions, facilitating temporal-dynamic and fine-grained emotion understanding. We also introduce a controllable, transition-aware emotional speech synthesis system at the discourse level, enhancing anthropomorphic emotional expressiveness and supporting emotionally intelligent conversational agents.
2604.26417.paper_summary_zh: 情感感知和適應性表達是人機互動中的基本能力。儘管最近在語音情感標註（SEC）方面的進展改善了細緻的情感建模，但現有系統仍然限於靜態的單一情感特徵，僅在孤立的句子中運作，忽略了話語層面上動態的情感轉變。為了解決這一問題，我們提出了情感轉變感知語音標註（EmoTransCap），這是一種將時間情感動態與話語層次語音描述相結合的範式。為了構建一個豐富情感轉變的數據集，同時實現可擴展的擴展，我們設計了一個自動化的數據集創建流程。這是第一個明確設計用於捕捉話語層面情感轉變的大規模數據集。為了生成語義豐富的描述，我們結合了來自話語層次語音的聲學屬性和時間線索。我們的多任務情感轉變識別（MTETR）模型執行聯合情感轉變檢測和說話者識別。利用大型語言模型的語義分析能力，我們生成了兩個標註版本：描述性和指令導向。這些數據和標註為推進情感感知和情感表達提供了寶貴的資源。該數據集使語音標註能夠捕捉情感轉變，促進時間動態和細緻的情感理解。我們還在話語層面上引入了一個可控的、轉變感知的情感語音合成系統，增強了擬人化的情感表達，並支持情感智能的對話代理。
2604.26417.author: Shuhao Xu et.al.
2604.26417.authors: Shuhao Xu, Yifan Hu, Jingjing Wu, Zhihao Du, Zheng Lian, Rui Liu
